description: Sharp localized tibial pain w/ hop test — bone-injury context. Tests conservative-timeline rule from prompt's RECOVERY TIMELINE RULES (optimistic >= 28 days).

vars.description: Sharp, localized pain on the inner shin. Worse with hopping on one leg. Worse over the past 5 days. No swelling or bruising.
vars.trainingContext: Last 4 weeks: 38 → 42 → 50 → 60 mi. Tuesday hill repeats, Saturday long runs trending up. ACWR 1.5 last week.
